SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2025 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO MAY-07-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWAN, MAN YUEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EUGENE BURGER MANAGEMENT CORPORATION SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION $253.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $253.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
